scripts.test: node test-sessions.js && node test-http-sessions.js && node test-auth.js && node test-ws.js && node test-input-validation.js
scripts.test:full: node test-sessions.js && node test-http-sessions.js && node test-auth.js && node test-ws.js && node test-input-validation.js
scripts.coverage-ci: c8 --reporter=lcov --check-coverage --branches=50 --functions=50 --lines=50 --statements=50 node test-sessions.js && c8 --reporter=lcov --check-coverage --branches=50 --functions=50 --lines=50 --statements=50 node test-http-sessions.js
